name: Flomo MCP Server
what_it_does: Flomo MCP server enabling AI agents to create and retrieve memos in Flomo — the popular Chinese minimalist note-taking and knowledge capture app — sending notes to Flomo via its API, tagging entries, and integrating Flomo's frictionless capture workflow into agent-driven knowledge management and journaling pipelines.
use_cases: Capturing insights and notes to Flomo from research agents
Creating tagged memos from information processing agents
Logging AI conversation summaries to personal knowledge base in Flomo
Capturing daily reflections from journaling agents
Storing code snippets and technical notes to Flomo from coding agents
Building personal knowledge pipelines that write to Flomo automatically
not_for: Non-Flomo users (primarily used in Chinese market)
Reading/searching Flomo notes (API is primarily write-focused)
Teams needing full CRUD — Flomo API has limited read capabilities
best_when: A Flomo user wants AI agents to automatically capture, log, or write notes to their Flomo account as part of knowledge management or journaling workflows.
avoid_when: You don't use Flomo or need bidirectional sync — use Obsidian, Notion, or Roam MCPs for richer knowledge management.

auth.notes: Flomo API key required. Available from Flomo account settings at flomoapp.com. Write-only API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Flomo: free tier with basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Flomo Pro: subscription for full features
pricing.notes: Flomo has free and paid tiers. API access available to all account holders. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Flomo API rate limits apply (not publicly documented)

known_agent_gotchas: Primarily write-only API — reading/searching notes is limited or unavailable
Flomo API documentation is primarily in Chinese — English docs limited
Rate limits not clearly documented — monitor for throttling
Data stored on Flomo servers in China — consider for privacy-sensitive notes
Community MCP from chatmcp — check for updates as Flomo API evolves
Note formatting may be limited — Flomo uses simple markdown
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS for Flomo API. Store API key as environment variable. Notes stored on Flomo servers (China). Community MCP. Don't send sensitive or confidential information.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Data on Flomo servers in CN. Community MCP. Avoid sensitive data.
